camps.name: Eye Check Camp
camps.description: Free eye screening and spectacle distribution

camps.name: Diabetes Screening
camps.description: Free blood sugar testing and diet consultation

alerts.title: Dengue Outbreak Alert
alerts.detail: 12 confirmed cases in last 7 days. Use mosquito nets and remove stagnant water.

alerts.title: COVID Booster Available
alerts.detail: Free booster doses available at all Primary Health Centers for 18+ age group.

alerts.title: Water Contamination
alerts.detail: E.coli detected in village water supply. Boil water advisory in effect.

alerts.title: Heatwave Advisory
alerts.detail: Temperatures expected 45°C+. Stay hydrated, avoid outdoor work 11AM-4PM.

fever.advice: Rest, stay hydrated, and monitor temperature. If fever persists >3 days or exceeds 103°F, consult a doctor immediately.

headache.advice: Rest in a dark, quiet room. Stay hydrated. If headaches are severe or recurring, consult a doctor.

cough.advice: Warm fluids and steam inhalation can help. If cough persists >2 weeks, get TB screening done.

chest pain.advice: ⚠ EMERGENCY: This could be a heart attack. Go to the nearest hospital IMMEDIATELY. Call 108 for ambulance.

diarrhea.advice: Start ORS immediately. Avoid solid food for a few hours. If blood in stool or dehydration signs, visit hospital.

skin rash.advice: Avoid scratching. Apply calamine lotion. If rash spreads or causes fever, see a dermatologist.

joint pain.advice: Rest the affected joint. Apply warm compress. If pain is severe or following injury, see an orthopedic specialist.

breathing.advice: Sit upright to ease breathing. If you have an inhaler, use it. If difficulty is severe, seek emergency care immediately.

vomiting.advice: Sip fluids slowly. Avoid solid food for 6 hours. If vomiting persists >24hrs, seek medical attention.

stomach pain.advice: Avoid spicy and oily food. If pain is severe, localized, or accompanied by fever, consult a doctor.

cold.advice: Rest, warm fluids, steam inhalation. Common cold resolves in 7-10 days. See doctor if symptoms worsen.

diabetes.advice: Monitor blood sugar regularly. Follow prescribed diet. Never skip medication without consulting your doctor.
